content.rendered:
Join us on “Marketing In The Now” as host David Reske welcomes David Edelman, a luminary in digital marketing and strategy, to explore the cutting-edge of artificial intelligence in marketing personalization. With a storied career that includes significant roles at Aetna/CVS and teaching at Harvard Business School, Edelman dives into how AI is revolutionizing the marketing landscape by enabling hyper-personalized customer experiences. In this episode, Edelman elucidates the concept of a “segment of one,” where AI’s analytical prowess allows brands to engage with customers as individuals, offering tailored interactions that were previously unimaginable. Listeners will gain insights into practical AI applications and strategies that companies can adopt to not just predict, but also shape consumer preferences and behaviors in real-time. Whether you’re a marketing professional seeking to enhance customer engagement or a business leader looking to leverage AI for strategic advantage, this episode offers valuable perspectives on harnessing technology to deepen customer relationships.

Tune in to discover how you can transform your marketing efforts with the power of AI, as explained by one of the industry’s foremost experts.
